scripts.test: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/__tests__/*.test.js
scripts.test:retailer-seeds: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/__tests__/retailerSeed.test.js dist-test/__tests__/infraSeed.test.js dist-test/__tests__/retailerQueries.test.js
